item.description:
# Clip 1.3.7
Clip 1.3.7 adds live, codec-specific stream tuning and more predictable color for Live Share.
## Live Share
- Add advanced controls for VP8, VP9, AV1, and H.264, available from both Settings and an active Live Share session. - Apply advanced changes to the current stream immediately, preview the result, reset one codec to Clip's defaults, and persist each codec independently. - Add Compatible Rec.709, Full-range Rec.709, and experimental Native Display color modes. - Preserve Rec.709 color metadata through AV1 encoding, decoding, and Clip's native Metal viewer for more accurate color and flatter solid-color regions. - Keep H.264's VideoToolbox-specific quality, QP, and keyframe controls while exposing the applicable WebRTC sender controls consistently for every codec.
## Dependency update
- Use Clip's reviewed WebRTC M150 build with an auditable source patch, immutable binary checksum, and complete bundled third-party notices.
The Live Share server protocol and web viewer are unchanged.
## Requirements
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon. This build uses the same stable Apple Development identity as previous updater releases.
